2007 PORSCHE CAYMAN S  ARCTIC SILVER METALLIC / BLACK STANDARD LEATHER  TIPTRONIC S  SPORT CHRONO  19" CARRERA S WHEELS  BIXENON HEADLAMPS  BOSE HIGHEND SOUND  HEATED SEATS  PREFERRED PACKAGE w/ TIP  RAIN SENSOR & SELFDIMMING MIRRORS   COMPLIMENTARY UBER RIDES  FREE VALET SERVICE AT HONDA OF DOWNTOWN CHICAGO  This 2007 Porsche Cayman S in Arctic Silver Metallic delivers the balanced midengine performance and precision handling that made the 987 chassis a modern classic. Inside, the Black Standard Leather cabin features heated front seats, floor mats in interior color, and Porsches signature driverfocused layout.  This example is equipped with the Tiptronic S transmission and the highly desirable Sport Chrono Package (W/Out PCM), enhancing throttle response and performance dynamics. The Preferred Package w/ Tip adds convenience and comfort upgrades, including selfdimming mirrors and a rain sensor.  Exterior highlights include 19" Carrera S wheels, wheel caps with colored crest, and the BiXenon Headlamp Package, giving the car a sharp, upscale presence. The cabin offers a comfortable layout and a practical trunk for daily use. Standard safety features include anti-lock brakes, traction control on select trims, and front and side-impact airbags. With its solid performance options and straightforward design, the 2007 Pontiac G6 remains a functional and affordable midsize sedan choice. description: GR Auto Gallery is excited to present this 2008 Lexus LS 600h L finished in Obsidian Black over a Black leather interior. As the flagship long wheelbase sedan in the Lexus lineup, the LS 600h L represents the brands commitment to blending performance, innovation, and luxury at the highest level. The deep black paint highlights the elegant proportions of the extended body, while subtle chrome accents and refined styling cues give it a commanding yet understated presence. Power comes from a 5.0L V8 hybrid system paired with an 8 speed CVT automatic transmission and all wheel drive. The LS 600h L was one of the first full size luxury sedans to successfully combine V8 performance with hybrid efficiency, delivering smooth, near silent acceleration with impressive power on demand. The transition between electric and gasoline power is seamless, creating an effortless driving experience. This example is currently sitting on aftermarket coilovers for a more aggressive stance, and it also comes with the original factory air ride suspension for those who prefer the stock setup and adjustable comfort. Inside, the cabin reflects Lexus craftsmanship at its finest. Rich wood interior trim accents add warmth and sophistication against the black leather seating surfaces. The long-wheelbase design provides exceptional rear-seat comfort, complete with rear climate controls and audio adjustments integrated into the rear armrest. Power window shades enhance privacy and comfort, while the sunroof brings in natural light when desired. A center console storage compartment adds practicality, and the inclusion of a remote with a movie player highlights the executive level amenities this model offered when new. Even the brown leather owners manual and book cover reflect the attention to detail Lexus invested in this flagship sedan. The LS 600h L was positioned at the very top of the Lexus lineup, competing with the best European luxury sedans of its time while offering renowned Toyota reliability. With advanced hybrid technology, all-wheel drive capability, and a long list of premium features, it remains an impressive and forward-thinking vehicle even today. This example offers a unique combination of modern stance, included factory components, and top-tier luxury in a highly engineered package. This 2009 Honda Civic Sdn LX, has a Taffeta White exterior and an Beige interior color. 236,504 miles.  Stock Number N38943B. You can connect with us by calling 781-933-1100.     No Accidents!  One Owner!   OTHER NOTABLE FEATURES AND OPTIONS YOU SHOULD KNOW ABOUT:      Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. MechanicalPowertrain and Mechanical Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same?  With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time. Inline-4 engines produce adequate horsepower while typically offering better fuel efficiency and more economical maintenance than larger engines.Safety and Security Ignition immobilizer - Theft is a non-starter.  You can feel more secure about your vehicle being there when you come back.  Ignition immobilizer is a passive security system consisting of a transmitter in the ignition key and a sensor located in the vehicle. If both are not present or do not recognize each other, the vehicle will not start.  Ignition immobilizer a sure-fire way to prevent the theft of your vehicle. The 2012 Toyota Venza XLE is a midsize crossover that blends the comfort of a sedan with the versatility of an SUV. Designed for smooth everyday driving, the Venza delivers a quiet ride, confident handling, and a spacious interior that makes it well suited for commuting, road trips, and family use. The XLE trim adds an elevated level of comfort and convenience, offering a refined cabin with quality materials and a clean, user-friendly layout. Inside, the Venza provides generous seating space for passengers along with a flexible cargo area that adapts easily to daily errands or longer travel needs. Its wide-opening rear hatch and practical design make loading and unloading simple and convenient. Toyota's reputation for reliability, safety, and long-term value is a key strength of the Venza. With its combination of comfort, versatility, and proven dependability, the 2012 Toyota Venza XLE remains a smart choice for buyers seeking a well-rounded and practical crossover. IMPORTANT PACKAGE INFORMATION   Comfort This upholstery simulates leather, is durable and easy to keep  Cruise control - Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Meet your ultimate co-pilot; cruise  and Mechanical Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same?  With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time. Performance with punch. A DOHC valvetrain produces more power and runs at a higher speed than standard OHV engines so you can get where you're going  and Security Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. The leather-wrapped steering wheel with audio controls and the auto-dimming rearview mirror with compass add a touch of sophistication to your daily commute.  With its impressive performance, versatile capabilities, and premium features, the 2011 Nissan Titan SV is the perfect choice for those who demand more from their pickup.
